title: DOJ releases Epstein records with allegations against Trump
shortDescription: The release came after news reports about the documents being withheld. The Department of Justice said the documents had been “incorrectly coded."

title: Arkansas man charged with murder wins GOP primary in sheriff's election
shortDescription: Aaron Spencer was charged with second-degree murder in 2024 in the killing of a man accused of being his daughter's abuser.

title: Obama, Biden attend Jesse Jackson's funeral
shortDescription: Barack Obama, Joe Biden and Bill Clinton attended a memorial service to celebrate the life of civil rights activist Reverend Jesse Jackson in Chicago.

title: Beyond the Iran war: Trump's no-good, very-bad day on jobs, gas, Epstein
shortDescription: The White House was dealing not only with questions about the war but also a decline in jobs, a rise in gas prices and more Epstein files.

title: What has Trump said about running for a third term? He is limited to 2
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has talked about going for a third term as president, but the U.S. Constitution limits him to two terms. See his comments on it.

title: Trump demands Iran's 'unconditional surrender'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump demanded Iran's "unconditional surrender" in a social media post.

title: Obama, Biden, Clinton attend Jesse Jackson 'People's Celebration'
shortDescription: Former Presidents Joe Biden, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton attend the Chicago “People’s Celebration” homegoing for late Rev. Jesse Jackson in Chicago.

title: Voters head to polls on Tuesday to replace MTG in Georgia's 14th
shortDescription: Former congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene resigned in January, leading to a special election to replace her on March 10.

title: Iran updates: Trump wants 'unconditional surrender' as gas prices rise
shortDescription: Trump's call for full capitulation came hours after Iran's president said mediation efforts to end the war were under way.

title: Gas price per gallon up 27 cents, per AAA. Trump said he’s not concerned
shortDescription: Donald Trump told Reuters he did not “have any concern” about higher gas prices after Iran. AAA found price per gallon is up nearly 27 cents in a week.

title: Rep. Tony Gonzales ends reelection bid after admitting to affair
shortDescription: Rep. Tony Gonzales from Texas has been embroiled in controversy after allegations spread about an affair with his late ex-staffer.

title: Capitol rioter pardoned by Trump gets life for child sex abuse
shortDescription: A Florida man who was pardoned for his role in the Jan. 6, 2021, attack was sentenced to life in prison for molesting two children, prosecutors said.

title: Trump ousts Noem as his deportation push faces setbacks
shortDescription: Trump removed Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem with a March 5 social media post thanking her for her service.

title: Reactions from Capitol Hill after Noem's firing
shortDescription: Kristi Noem's firing comes after a controversial tenure at DHS with nationwide protests, a partial government shutdown and a divisive ad campaign.

title: Trump tells Iran army to surrender
shortDescription: President Trump called on the Iranian army to surrender or “face absolutely guaranteed death” as the conflict in Iran continues to rage on.
